TextData: Your brains... I shall gorge upon them...
Your minds are mine to command!
Relinquish your wills to me...and hasten to your doom!
If only I had my feast... Then you would...
Break this accursed seal... Set me free!
Grrr... The seal... You meddlesome curs!
The demon is gathering its power!
My servants... Come to me!
Free at last! Now for your just reward...I shall rend you asunder!
Those patterns...they are his!? No, I shall have my freedom!
Urgh... My life...slips away...
Welcome to my humble shop! Feast your eyes upon wondrous wares sold at a pittance!
Cursed treasures from Amdapor, Skalla, Mhach, and beyond! There's an item to tickle every fancy!
I believe I have just the thing for you... Yes, yes, it suits you perfectly! In fact, I can't let you leave until you buy this magnificent piece!
Be warned, you must pay the exact price. No more, and no less! Excess coins shall carry a terrible curse...

ああ、ちゃんと買い物できなかったのカァ……
じゃあ、呪われても仕方ないネェ！
Now behold, my finest offerings! Each one bearing a more wicked curse than the last!

Intruders sighted. Moving to eliminate immediately.
Resistance confirmed. Deploying cannons.
Resistance persists. Apprehending intruders.
Resistance reaching dangerous levels. Employing incapacitating force.
Situation dire. Switching to strategy of assured destruction.
Oink, oink, oink! Tricksy trio unite!
The tricksy trio unites anew, and this time we're serious! Oink!
Oink, oink! Behold the true power of our tenacious triumvirate!
Get ready for Triton's flammable extravaganza!
Or rather, behold the true power of Triton─star of the show!
Oink, oink! I'm a flaming menace, through and through!
Sssnooowed uuunder!
Oinking fools! It's Nereid's turn to take center stage!
You're nothing more than a pair of frosty unfortunates!
Brace yourselves for a putrid poison blast!
Just kidding, it's Phobos's time to shine! Oink!
Oink, oink, oink! You're in for some toxic trouble now!
F-Forgive me friends! I promise I'll behave myself now...
I-I'm sorry! I'll play nice... I swear!
My flame grows dim! I give in!
My poisons have all dried up!
Oinksome wretches! I can't stand the sight of you!
Oink, oink, oink!
Oooiiink!
It's oink-oink-over! We're outta here!
Oink, oink! Everyone gets a piece of the action!
Armed trespassers detected. They must be eliminated.
<clank> Deploying defense units!
<clunk> <click> Summoning reinforcements!
Autonomy granted to defense units. Show no mercy to the intruders!
<click> Granting permission for special offensive maneuvers!
Dangerous elements remain. Permitting free use of entire arsenal!
<clank> <clunk> Granting permission for self-destruction!
Oh dear customers, you do know the value of these rare treasures, yes?
You may only carry two bags of coins─remember! Break my rule at your own peril...
All who threaten the tower's sanctity will be purged!
I call forth the might of the sanguine!
Unfettered power!
Vile infractors, prepare to meet your end!
I commit my strength, my blood...my life!
Beginning authentication process...

Authentication complete in 30 seconds...
Authentication complete in 20 seconds...
Authentication complete in 10 seconds...
Authentication complete in 5...
Authentication complete in 4...
Hrrrghhh... Grrr...
Grrr... Be...gone!
Graaahhhrrr!
Hrrrng... You will not...escape!
All...shall turn to dust...
Authentication complete. Begin the unlock process.
Occult cylinders active. Initiate the authentication process.
Authentication complete in 3...
Authentication complete in 2...
Authentication complete in 1...
The lock is unbound... The path ahead is clear.
Clear the Palaeography Room
Clear the central passages
Clear the Astronomy Room
Clear the pronged passage
Clear the Glaciology Forum
Clear the binding lock
Clear the Haematology Room
Allow me to start by showing you this marvelous red ruby from the city of Mhach! Within it burns fire not of this world!
Our next masterwork is from Skalla, that abode of mages most mighty! A sapphire of such chilling cold that life itself freezes at its touch!
And lastly, my personal favorite... The shell of a tortoise, polished to a mirror sheen and slippery smooth!
Oink, oink! Prepare to die at the hands of we tricksy three!
Pot of Plunder
Gimme an elixir! Gimme one, and I'll make it worth your while!
Thank you for the elixir! Take care, and good luck!
Got any more elixirs? Maybe I can find another treasure if you do...
